summary: Iteration 355 - Dashboard Empty State Fix Testing Complete. Both scenarios passed. SCENARIO 1 (Normal Data): Hero shows 'Clover and the Golden Key' with poster image, FEATURED badge, Watch & Continue + Create New buttons. Trending Now (10 cards), Fresh Stories (10 cards), Watch Now (10 cards) - total 30 cards. Credits show 'Unlimited credits'. No empty state. SCENARIO 2 (Empty Data via API Intercept): Hero shows fallback 'Your Story Universe Awaits' with gradient background and 'Create Your First Story' CTA. Trending Now (6 seed cards), Fresh Stories (6 seed cards) - total 12 cards. All seed cards have CREATE badge and '+ Create' CTA. Seed card titles verified: 'A Midnight Train to Nowhere', 'The Last Dragon's Secret', 'The Map That Bleeds'. No empty state - page NEVER shows empty. Backend APIs verified: story-feed returns 20 trending stories, R2 proxy HEAD returns 200 with Accept-Ranges: bytes, Range request returns 206 Partial Content.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.js SEED_CARDS constant provides 6 fallback CTA cards when no real data exists
HeroSection renders unconditionally - shows real hero or fallback 'Your Story Universe Awaits'
Trending Now and Fresh Stories rows ALWAYS render (real stories or seed cards)
Watch Now row only renders when real video stories exist (correct behavior)
Seed cards have is_seed:true flag, CREATE badge, and '+ Create' CTA instead of 'Continue'
R2 media proxy correctly handles HEAD (200), GET (200), and Range requests (206)
engagement.py story-feed API returns up to 20 completed stories without thumbnail_url filter
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data and API intercept for empty scenario
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard empty state fix fully verified. SCENARIO 1 (normal data): Hero + 3 rows with 30 real story cards. SCENARIO 2 (empty API via intercept): Hero fallback + 2 rows with 12 seed cards. Page NEVER shows empty. Seed cards have CREATE badge and '+ Create' CTA.

SCENARIO_1_Hero_Title.details: data-testid='hero-title' shows 'Clover and the Golden Key'

SCENARIO_1_Hero_Poster.details: data-testid='hero-poster' exists with real thumbnail image

SCENARIO_1_Trending_Now_10_Cards.details: data-testid='trending-now' has 10 story cards with real titles

SCENARIO_2_Trending_Now_6_Seed_Cards.details: Trending Now row has 6 seed cards with titles like 'A Midnight Train to Nowhere', 'The Last Dragon's Secret'

SCENARIO_2_Fresh_Stories_6_Seed_Cards.details: Fresh Stories row has 6 seed cards

SCENARIO_2_Total_12_Cards.details: 12 total cards even with empty API data

SCENARIO_2_No_Empty_State.details: No empty dead space - hero + rows fill the page

SCENARIO_2_CREATE_Badges.details: 12 CREATE badges found on seed cards

Backend_Story_Feed_API.details: GET /api/engagement/story-feed returns hero object and trending array with 20 stories

Backend_R2_Proxy_Range.details: Range request returns 206 Partial Content with 1024 bytes

mocked_apis_list: SCENARIO 2 used Playwright page.route() to intercept /api/engagement/story-feed and return empty data: {hero:null, trending:[], characters:[], live_stats:{total_stories:11}}
mocked_apis.note: SCENARIO 1 used real APIs. SCENARIO 2 intercepted story-feed API to simulate empty data scenario.

playwright_note: Hero video element may not exist in Playwright tests because Chromium doesn't support H.264 codec. The poster image is the expected fallback behavior.
